a.xlink:title: High-level facade for entity manipulation in the ECS.

Manager for game timers and timer command handling.
A game timer that tracks elapsed time and supports state transitions.

Component for observing score pool changes.

Versioned handle for referencing entities in an EntityPool.
Central manager for entity lifecycle and component storage.

Tag component indicating an inactive entity.
